replies_posted.reply_text: That's just petty. Shouldn't be about hate for one if you like another. Both legends in their own right
Tatum's court vision has always been underrated. That 7-assist game back in Dallas was a glimpse of what he can do as a playmaker
Yeah but that's exactly the point - they've never had a team as talented as this with that much to prove. I think he'll feel every bit of pressure
Brunson's not that easy to quiet, though
Yeah I'm still salty about that. Jalen Duren's growth was real, but that roster still needed a star to contend
Not fair, man. Canseco's frame is different. LeBron's got size and athleticism, not comparing to steroid users
Yeah, his turnovers are a major concern. But it's not just Schroder, their whole offense is a mess when they're getting pressed
Yeah that knee was a ticking bomb. Draining it in the playoffs was a nightmare for Miami, but Bron stepped up
Butler was hurt most of the series and Harden had to carry it alone. Not exactly an equal partnership
Perth Wildcats are a NBL team, not NBA. Play-in tournament is for the NBL playoffs
21-point lead erased and still can't close? Not the best sign for their NCAA tournament hopes
Yeah they all led teams to titles, but how many of those titles were due to the turnover difference?
Same, Vince 2000 was something else too 🤯
Still think KD was the glue that held that team together. His all-around game was insane
Giannis was 1v5 in the finals, that's not 'playing off' him
Thought he'd have more impact on the game, but his defense was solid
Yeah, but can he do it consistently? Last year's playoff collapse still lingers
Parece que los Nets tienen un 'regalo' en su defensa 🤣. Harden y Irving llevan un peso
Nice win for the Nets. Harden's 30 wasn't enough for the 76ers though?
Thanks to you too for being a part of the hype all season!
Love the Cavs spread, think they'll cover it.
Finally some news on Bronny's future. But what's the catch? 🤔
Yeah, still a little tentative on that one. Hope he regains his confidence soon
That's a big hit for Orlando. Losing Vucevic hurts their playoffs push
True that. Iowa's D is way faster than what Michigan sees in the B1G. Will be a great test for Cadeau
